name: shadow_vault
description: A hidden vault beneath the Rogue Sanctum where the guild's most valuable stolen goods are kept. The further you go, the more dangerous the secrets become.
note_texts: A dossier on every major merchant in the city. Someone has been compiling this for years.
A vault door, partially ajar. Inside — crates of stolen weapons, armour, and sealed scroll cases.
One scroll case is different from the others. It bears the seal of the royal treasury. It is empty.
A private journal: 'The Guild of Shadows is not just a guild. It is a government. They have always been watching.'
The deepest vault is not locked. It is guarded. What waits inside is the Guild's greatest secret — and its most dangerous protectors.
unlock_message: The Guild of Shadows stirs — its inner chamber is now open to you.
